habitat: Mediterranean origin; cultivated across temperate Europe.
traditionalUsesEn: Mild restlessness and sleep difficulty; digestive discomfort; lemony culinary herb.
traditionalUsesDe: Leichte Unruhe und Einschlafprobleme; Verdauungsbeschwerden; Küchenkraut.
activeCompounds: Essential oil (citral, citronellal), rosmarinic acid, flavonoids
preparation: Fresh or dried leaf tea; culinary use; tinctures.
cautions: Generally well tolerated as tea; essential oil diluted only.
historicalNotes: Medieval monastic gardens; name Melissa from Greek for bee.
